programme.title: Plática pendiente
programme.desc: Aníbal le habla a Adriana de su hija. Pone a Niki en contra de Adriana. Victoria está molesta con Arriaga. Arriaga aconseja a Adriana. Leo de quiere vengar de salcero. Kendra lleva a Cristina a Cozumel.

programme.title: La madre de Guzmán
programme.desc: Stefan visita a Victoria y Jean Marie lo atiende. Niki visita su psicólogo. Aníbal manda un cheque al Dr. Montaño. Paula va a dar clases a Niki y le hace confidencias a Victoria. Niki enfrenta a Paula.

programme.title: Otra hermana
programme.desc: Victoria intercede por Paula con Guzmán. Paula va a ver a Aníbal. Ella le dice q tiene otra hija. Aníbal cita a Arriaga para callarlo. Victoria lo sigue. Salcero es atacados by Leo. Kendra habla mal de salcero a Cristina.

programme.title: Bendición de boda
programme.desc: Guzmán ayuda a Salcero. Adriana amenaza a Paula para q hable. Victoria le dice a Arriaga q el solo es su escolta. Nelson le dice a Niki q el aprueba q se case con Roy. Guzmán los escucha.

programme.title: Futura infidelidad
programme.desc: Roy no llega a su cita con Niki. Ella le dice a Guzmán q está feliz con su prometido. Victoria está celosa de Opalina.

programme.title: Desaparición nocturna
programme.desc: Niki está celosa q Guzmán pase la noche fuera. Opalina aconseja a Arriaga. Guzmán descubre a Adriana.

programme.title: Desinterés del pasado
programme.desc: Aníbal sale del hospital. Nelson hace confidencias a salcero. Kendra pretende chantajear a Cristina. Victoria confronta a Aníbal.

programme.title: Amante y maestra
programme.desc: Arriaga le reclama a Paula ir a la casa de Victoria. Kendra le dice a Cristina q salcero es violento. Lili le hace confidencias a Opalina. Adriana le reclama a Arriaga. Roy le hace in regalo a Niki.

programme.title: Compromiso de amor
programme.desc: Aníbal le dice a Adriana q quiere ayudarla. Victoria toma clases de piano con Paula y le hace confidencias. Paula fuerza hablar con Guzmán. Arriaga le reclama a Cristina.

programme.title: La desaparición del padre
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: The Painted Parademic
programme.desc: When a paramedic and mother is found dead and covered in paint in the basement of her Massachusetts home, investigators must work tirelessly for 18 months to find the person responsible.

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: In Southwest Florida, Terrance Williams, a young father, disappears. As his mother retraces his steps she uncovers something ominous: the last known person to see Terrance alive has a strange and disturbing connection to another missing man.

programme.title: It Could Have Been Me
programme.desc: Two teenage girls fall for men who seem to care about them. Instead, the girls are lured into human trafficking and coerced into prostitution.

programme.title: Wife's Double Life
programme.desc: When a young husband is thrown in jail for the murder of his newlywed wife, most people in their small Oklahoma community believed the case was solved. But odd cell tower records and surprising DNA evidence force investigators to take a second look.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: In St. Petersburg, Florida, Cabretti Wheeler and his friend Kyle Ellis are killed. When the only eye-witness vanishes, it's up to Cabretti's mom, Lisa Wheeler, to help police solve the case, even if it means risking her own life for justice.

programme.title: Speaking from the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret Purk is just days away from having her first baby when, after an apparent suicide by hanging, she and her unborn son are dead. Twenty-four years later, new clues lead investigators to re-open the case. Was this suicide actually a homicide?

programme.title: The Vanishing Clerk
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Eyes Like Daddy
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Los ex

programme.title: El cumpleaños de Germán
programme.desc: Todos se olvidan del cumpleaños de Germán, a pesar de estar invitados a la fiesta. Lorena y Frankie le dicen a Benito que volverá a los castings.

programme.title: La amiga incómoda
programme.desc: La amiga de Silvita se queda en el departamento de los recién casados, ya que se ha quedado sin casa. Además, Magda trata de convencer a los vecinos para que acepten poner un anuncio en la fachada del edificio.

programme.title: El nuevo reglamento
programme.desc: Los Rivers solo tienen dinero para comer atún. Así que Frankie envía a Benito a hacer el casting para interpretar al Sol. Pero Luis propone realizar un nuevo reglamento de convivencia vecinal.

programme.title: La historia de Jorjáis
programme.desc: Jorjáis cuenta su verdadera historia, y hará llorar a más de uno. Mientras tanto, como Frankie y Lorena no están en casa, Benito y Liz aprovecharán para hacer algo en su ausencia.

programme.title: El sueño angélico
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles es una tierna chica cansada de dar la prueba de amor por todos lados, no pierde la esperanza de encontrar al hombre de su vida. Una noche por revelación divina, sus ángeles de la guarda le anuncian la llegada de su ser amado, pero tendrá que realizar una serie de peripecias al seguir una las señales para que esto ocurra. Mientras tanto su vecina Doña Lucha con quien no tiene buena relacion y que es madre de El Chino y Rosa Aurora, recibe la llegada de su hijo consentido Albertano quien se había ausentado para probar suerte en Estados Unidos. Albertano decide vivir solo en el cuarto de azotea ya que siente que el viaje lo ha hecho un hombre maduro e independiente, claro mientras que su madre le lave, le planche, le suba el desayuno y le prenda el boiler. María no encuentra las señales, pero en la noche mientras tiende tristemente su ropa en la azotea, descubre a Albertano quien le ayuda caballerosamente a tender sus sabanas, María ve en ello la señal que había estado esperando.

programme.title: El perro de los focos
programme.desc: María sueña que los ángeles le dicen que solo mirando directamente a los ojos de Albertano sabrá si éste es ó no el amor de su vida, así que decide provocar un nuevo encuentro con él. Don Carmelo percibe un fuerte olor a gas y le pide a María que suba a buscar la fuga a la azotea, esto provoca el romántico encuentro en el patio trasero, donde María a toda costa trata de descubrir si Albertano es su alma gemela. Rosa Aurora decide subir a encontrar la fuga. y se encuentra con María su antagónica, discuten ya que el olor a gas es provocado por una fuga proveniente del boiler de Doña Lucha, esta arma un argüende al tratar de arreglar el desperfecto y provoca una explosión, María de todos los Ángeles recuerda que Albertano se ha quedado dormido en el cuarto de la azotea y heroicamente salva la vida de Albertano arriesgando la suya, sin embargo su felicidad se ve nublada al descubrir que Albertano es hijo de su enemiga Doña Lucha.

programme.title: Los chiles de la discordia
programme.desc: María sueña que los ángeles le dicen que para poder llegar al corazón de Albertano debe ganarse con humildad el corazón de su madre Doña Lucha, el sueño es interrumpido por el barullo del tianguis de los martes al que María acude cada semana a comerse un tlacoyo de masa azul. Albertano quien acompaña a su madre al tianguis se separa para ver los peces de un acuario y se encuentran con María, éste le agradece amablemente el haberle salvado la vida en el incidente de la fuga de gas y en un intercambio de halagos y agradecimiento Albertano sin darse cuenta invita María a comer , lo cual la pone feliz ya que ve en ello la oportunidad de ganarse a la familia de Albertano y trabajar su humildad. En el almacén de Don Carmelo deciden cambiar los candados por un sistema de seguridad muy sofisticado y con una tecnología que rebasa a Carmelito, quien por equivocación acciona el sistema de seguridad quedándose junto con Betsabé y Defino encerrados en la bodega. María llega a casa de Doña Lucha con un gran plato de chiles en nogada muy bien decorados, esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia en Doña Lucha, quien hará un esfuerzo por contener el enojo, ya que María tratando de quedar bien se mete hasta la cocina, desatándose una batalla campal durante la comida.

programme.title: San Chambelán
programme.desc: Maria has her Quinceañera party meanwhile Doña Lucha rents out her son's services as chamberlain.

programme.title: Sostengo el Pi
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles, ve atentamente un programa de televisión en el que el maestro de yoga da tres consejos básicos del feng shui para atraer la fortuna y el amor, esto provoca que María inmediatamente se ponga a mover muebles y a tirar cosas, al ver esto Carmelito pone el grito en el cielo, hasta que su nieta lo convence de que con esto sencillos cambios podrán atraer la fortuna y el dinero. Delfino y Betsabé llegan a casa de Doña Lucha a cobrar el dinero de una tanda que les debe de tiempo atrás, ésta que también ha visto el programa, y no tiene para pagarles, usa los argumentos de maestro Chuy y los convence de que se inscriban en un curso de feng shui que va a impartir, con lo cual aprovecha para ponerlos a mover los muebles de su casa, hasta que ya cansados deciden abandonar el curso. Como segundo paso Doña Lucha decide escombrar la casa y comienza a tirar cosas de Rosa Aurora, Albertano y del Chino, pero el mono de coco que ella trajo de Acapulco lo vuelve a colocar en el mismo lugar. La euforia por limpiar lleva a las dos familias hasta la azotea en la que se desata un conflicto por el espacio y por el respeto a sus pertenencias.

programme.title: Ofertín y los vinagres balsámicos
programme.desc: Albertano sale a la calle a buscar trabajo para que El Chino pueda ir a una excursión a los prismas basalticos, María se encuentra abatida ya que su abuelo quiere desaparecer la botarga de Ofertín quien baila junto a ella mientras anuncia sus ofertas, pues nadie se quiere meter dentro de esta, Albertano se ofrece gustoso y María le paga una semana por adelantado, con este dinero El Chino podría ir a su excursión. A la mañana siguiente, Albertano descubre que Doña Lucha ha tirado a la basura la botarga de Ofertín por error. Don Carmelo amenaza con demandarlos pero Rosa Aurora decide tomar el lugar del peluche y baila seductoramente lo que causa revuelo en la colonia e incrementa las ganancias de la tienda.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Perdimos todo
programme.desc: Luis comienza a molestar a Silvia todo el tiempo queriendo controlar lo que hace para cuidar del bebé. Magdalena invierte todo su dinero en una empresa fantasma y pierde todo.

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: El muñeco vudú
programme.desc: Germán y Jorjáis encuentran un muñeco vudú, asumen que alguien está haciendo brujería en el edificio. Pedro, Cris y Vanesa tienen problemas con el WiFi de su departamento.

programme.title: Síntomas empáticos
programme.desc: Luis descubre que es él (y no Silvia), quien tiene los síntomas del embarazo. Los vecinos encuentran en la calle carteles pegados de: "Se busca a Jorjáis".

programme.title: La hija de Jorjais
programme.desc: Una mujer le pregunta a Germán sobre el paradero de Jorjáis, y él se sorprende al descubrir que ella es su hija. Vanessa cree que tiene la maldición de la soltería.

programme.title: Niño o niña
programme.desc: Luis ya no sabe que hacer con Silvia porque tiene muchos cambios de humor por el embarazo, pero sus vecinos lo convencen de darle una sorpresa que jamás olvidará.

programme.title: Conserje aprendiz
programme.desc: Lorena acepta hacer un casting para interpretar el papel de La Doña. Germán decide enseñarle a Borrego a ser un gran conserje.

programme.title: El perfume
programme.desc: Magdalena se aprovecha de las náuseas que siente Silvia por el embarazo para que Luis le compre todo lo que ella quiere.

programme.title: Apolonio y la víbora
programme.desc: Vanesa lleva una serpiente al edificio y se le escapa. Ahora tiene que recuperarla sin que los vecinos se enteren. Silvia y Luis toman un curso psicoprofiláctico con una chica que resulta ser la ex de Luis.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 2
programme.desc: The adventure in Maryland continues as the guys have a successful sika deer hunt and throw an East Shore crab boil with local oysters and a homemade smoked sika deer ham.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Turkey Troubles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis escort first-time hunters Tracy and Maggie on a Montana turkey hunt. Emotions run high as the new hunters deal with failures and successes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Borderland Bucks Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and friends Ryan Callaghan and Mark Kenyon head south of the border in search of Coues deer on an old Mexican ranch that feels lost to time.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Borderland Bucks Part 2
programme.desc: An action-filled hunt in Mexico leads to a surplus of venison, so locals teach the guys how to produce wild game tamales from scratch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Memories: Montana Black Bear
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater - Walking In The Clouds
programme.desc: Steve and his brother Danny endure miserable weather in the glaciated high country of the Alaska Range as they search for a Dall sheep ram.

programme.title: MeatEater - Living Off the Water: Kentucky Fishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins his friend Kevin Murphy on a unique fishing adventure along the Mississippi and Ohio.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevadas high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks.

programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt.

programme.title: Lionel, The Live-In
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are kept up all night with the sounds of an argument coming from the Jeffersons home. This soon leads to Lionel temporarily moving in with the Bunkers after George refuses to allow his son to marry a girl who has a white father. Archie soon gets fed up and tries to get Lionel and George to make peace.

programme.title: Archie's Helping Hand
programme.desc: Irene has been job hunting and in her spare time, she has been spending time at her women's club with Edith. Not pleased that Edith has been at the women's club, he decides to help Irene get a job at his company. However, he is anything but pleased when she lands a job as a forklift driver on his loading dock.

programme.title: Gloria's Shock
programme.desc: Yet another argument erupts between Archie and Mike about the nation and its problems, Mike states that he does not want children. This takes Gloria by surprise and leads to an even bigger argument between Mike and Gloria.

programme.title: The Jeffersons Move Up
programme.desc: Edith stops by the Jeffersons home to say goodbye to her dear friend, Louise. It seems that George his struck it big with his dry cleaning business and has decided to 'move on up to the East side, to a deluxe apartment in the sky.'

programme.title: Archie And The Miracle
programme.desc: While at work, Archie is in a near fatal accident when a large crate nearly crushes him. This near death experience leads Archie to suddenly become a devout if somewhat hypocritical churchgoer.

programme.title: George And Archie Make A Deal
programme.desc: In a crooked attempt to buy the building next to his cleaning store, George Jefferson has decided to run for a position on the Republican county commission and needs Archie to sign a petition. Naturally, Archie wants to know what's in it for him if he signs.

programme.title: Archie's Contract
programme.desc: The Bunker home gets a visit by a fast talking furnace inspector who cons Archie into signing a contract to purchase two-thousand dollars worth of aluminim siding. Later, Irene and George warn Archie that the man is a fraud but are too late, the installation crew has just shown up.

programme.title: The Best Of All In The Family - Part 1
programme.desc: In celebration of its first 100 episodes, Henry Fonda hosts a retrospective of the previous episodes and explores the relationships and the characters that make up the Bunker household, via flashbacks.

programme.title: Pay The Twenty Dollars
programme.desc: Archie stops by Jefferson Cleaners to pick up some dry cleaning and pays with a twenty dollar bill. Later, a furious George shows up at the Bunker's front door claiming the bill Archie passed to him was counterfeit. This leads to two separate arguments: one between Archie and George and the other between Edith and Louise. Louise and Edith quickly make up and soon put a plan into motion that would clear up the entire mess between George and Archie.

programme.title: Where's Archie (Part I)
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria worry about Archie's sudden disappearance while on his way to a union convention in Buffalo. Not wanting to upset Edith, they keep this from her who is busy putting together her first Tupperware party and struggles with a short speech that she plans to give.

programme.title: Archie Is Missing (Part II)
programme.desc: After discovering that Archie is missing, Edith goes down to the police station with Mike to file a missing persons report. Later, while going through some of Archie's things, Mike discovers a photo of Archie with another woman. This leads him to believe that Archie may have run off with another woman.

programme.title: The Longest Kiss (Part III)
programme.desc: Edith has news that Archie finally called home to let everyone know where he was. Supposedly he got sidetracked to a podiatrists' convention in Rochester. Meanwhile, Mike and Gloria get into a big fight about lying which results in a kissing contest, just in time for a welcome home party.

programme.title: The Bunkers And Inflation (Part II)
programme.desc: With Archie out on strike, household funds have begun to dwindle, leaving Edith in a touch position trying to balance the little household income that is coming in. Meanwhile, tempers flare as Archie finds himself with nothing to do but sit around the house.

programme.title: The Bunkers And Inflation (Part III)
programme.desc: With Archie still on strike and the household income dwindling, Edith decides to go out and try to get a job. Louise comes to her rescue offering her a job working in one of George's cleaning stores. However, when Archie hears of this he refuses to take charity and tries to get Edith to turn the offer down.

programme.title: The Bunkers And Inflation (Part IV)
programme.desc: Archie begins to feel like the odd man out, with everyone working in the family except him. Meanwhile, negotiations continue with Archie's union but an agreement is finally made leaving Archie with a raise. However, Archie doesn't realize that the results of the negotiations will leave him worse off than before the strike began.

programme.title: Mike's Friend
programme.desc: One of Mike's graduate school friends, Stuart, comes over one evening for a visit and Gloria begins to feel like an intellectual outcast. This leads her to believe that perhaps as Mike becomes more educated in school, he may start looking for a smarter woman.

programme.title: Lionel, The Live-In
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are kept up all night with the sounds of an argument coming from the Jeffersons home. This soon leads to Lionel temporarily moving in with the Bunkers after George refuses to allow his son to marry a girl who has a white father. Archie soon gets fed up and tries to get Lionel and George to make peace.

However, he is anything but pleased when she lands a job as a forklift driver on his loading dock.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Gone in 60 Minutes)
programme.desc: Talk Show and Variety

programme.title: What a Day (Trump’s Senioritis)
programme.desc:
On today’s show, we are diving into the tough week our commander in chief just had. From MMA fights no one seems very excited about… to the potential end of warrantless surveillance because of an unpopular Trump hire, our dear president has been taking some big losses. Oh, and not to mention, the war with Iran is still going on. But Trump doesn’t seem to care about any of it! So to talk more about Donald Trump’s apparent case of senioritis, we called up Tim Miller, host of The Bulwark Podcast.
And in headlines: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire, a poll finds Trump is losing favor with Independents, and a federal judge agrees to extend a court-ordered block on Trump’s $1.8 billion slush fund.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Has The Left Finally Figured Out the Internet?)
programme.desc: Ever heard a popular TikToker wax poetic about who they’re voting for? They might be getting paid…and not disclosing by whom. Kyle Tharp, author of the Chaotic Era newsletter, joins Offline to discuss the emergence of pay-for-play political influencers and whether Democrats have made any progress in figuring out the internet. He and Jon talk about the decline of Ben Shapiro and the Daily Wire, the new success of legacy media on TikTok, and the intense grassroots anger around data centers.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Has The Left Finally Figured Out the Internet?)
programme.desc: Ever heard a popular TikToker wax poetic about who they’re voting for? They might be getting paid…and not disclosing by whom. Kyle Tharp, author of the Chaotic Era newsletter, joins Offline to discuss the emergence of pay-for-play political influencers and whether Democrats have made any progress in figuring out the internet. He and Jon talk about the decline of Ben Shapiro and the Daily Wire, the new success of legacy media on TikTok, and the intense grassroots anger around data centers.

programme.title: What a Day (Trump’s Senioritis)
programme.desc:
On today’s show, we are diving into the tough week our commander in chief just had. From MMA fights no one seems very excited about… to the potential end of warrantless surveillance because of an unpopular Trump hire, our dear president has been taking some big losses. Oh, and not to mention, the war with Iran is still going on. But Trump doesn’t seem to care about any of it! So to talk more about Donald Trump’s apparent case of senioritis, we called up Tim Miller, host of The Bulwark Podcast.
And in headlines: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire, a poll finds Trump is losing favor with Independents, and a federal judge agrees to extend a court-ordered block on Trump’s $1.8 billion slush fund.

programme.title: This F*cking Guy (Jared Kushner: Everything You Didn't Know About His Sh*tty Past)
programme.desc: In our 41st episode of This F*cking Guy, Erin and Alyssa dive deep into the past of the Dumb-a** Daddy’s Boy, Jared Kushner. From slithering into the top Ivy League with help from his corrupt father, to being one of NYC’s most soulless slumlords, to his abhorrent handling of COVID and his Middle East meddling under his father-in-law, this may be one of our more notorious nepo-baby guys yet.

programme.title: Pod Save America (David Sedaris is Mostly Bark, Some Bite)
programme.desc: Legendary humorist David Sedaris stops by the studio to talk to Lovett about his new book of essays, "The Land and Its People," his father's support for Trump, and what he learned about liberals when he was bitten by a dog. They also unpack Sedaris's frustration with being labeled "queer," his nonnegotiable rule about what not to discuss in a relationship, and his unique approach to growing older.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Xi’s Just Not That Into You)
programme.desc: China blows smoke up Trump’s skirt, Rand Paul’s son gets hot under the collar, and Marco Rubio slips into something a little more comfortable. This week, Outlander star Sam Heughan and Lovett explore online fandom and only one survives. Hacks’ Caitlin Reilly sweeps us off our feet and into the distant past, and we all journey to cloud nine for a hilarious round of Second Thoughts.

programme.title: Currents
programme.desc: As the danger begins to move closer to Scott (Tyler Posey) his trusted mentor and boss, Deaton (Seth Gilliam), is threatened. Meanwhile, Kali (Felisha Terrell) and the twins (Charlie Carver and Max Carver) go after Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Visionary
programme.desc: Seeking answers, Scott (Tyler Posey). Allison (Crystal Reed) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hear stories told by two unlikely narrators -- Peter (Ian Bohen) and Gerard (Michael Hogan) -- and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

programme.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: As Allison (Crystal Reed) begins to suspect someone close to her may be involved in the murders, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) conclude that Lydia's (Holland Roden) rising talents may be their best bet to solving the murders.

programme.title: The Overlooked
programme.desc: Trapped inside an evacuated Beacon Hills hospital during a powerful storm, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must defend themselves against the Alphas while trying to figure out how to save Cora's (Adelaide Kane) life.

programme.title: Alpha Pact
programme.desc: With the threat growing more personal and time running out, Scott (Tyler Posey) is forced to make a difficult choice to save family and friends while, at the same time, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) try to figure out how to save Cora.

programme.title: Lunar Ellipse
programme.desc: In the mid-season finale, under Deaton's advice, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends use an ancient but dangerous ritual to help them both save the lives of the people they love and stop Deucalion (Gideon Emery) from achieving his sinister goal.

programme.title: Anchors
programme.desc: Weeks after saving the lives of their parents, Scott, Stiles and Allison suffer strange side effects from their ritual sacrifice. At the same time, the newly enlightened Sheriff Stilinski scours through old cases, looking for supernatural causes.

programme.title: More Bad Than Good
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends race to figure out how to catch the Werecoyote Malia before it's hunted down and killed by her father. Meanwhile, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) are broken out of captivity by an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Galvanize
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, Mischief Night, a convicted murderer brought to Beacon Hills Hospital for surgery escapes, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends to step in to help when his unexpected target becomes clear.

programme.title: Illuminated
programme.desc: With Beacon Hills under curfew due to the power outage, the teens decide to throw a black light Halloween party while Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to get Kira (Arden Cho) to trust him in the midst of an attack by a strange new threat.

programme.title: Dangerous Diaper Dan
programme.desc: Diaper Dan, secretly working for the A.J. Kimberly Adver-tising Agency, gives Samantha a baby rattle. As the rattle is bugged, Dan is able to tape all the conversation at the Stephens home.

programme.title: The Short Happy Circuit Of Aunt Clara
programme.desc: The Stephens are invited to the Tate home to meet a client, Mr. MacElroy, who manufactures shoes.

programme.title: I'd Rather Twitch Than Fight
programme.desc: Darrin is furious when Samantha gives his orange and green checked sport jacket, bought before he was married, to Good Will.

programme.title: Oedipus Hex
programme.desc: Samantha agrees to serve on a fund raising committee.

programme.title: Sam's Spooky Chair
programme.desc: Shopping for antiques, Samantha is intrigued by an old chair which moves about to catch her attention.

programme.title: My Friend Ben
programme.desc: Finding Samantha struggling to repair a lamp, Aunt Clara uses her uncertain powers of magic to summon an electrician. Benjamin Franklin, in l8th century clothes, appears. Samantha is upset by Ben's presence and Aunt Clara's wail that she can't remember how to undo the spell. Darrin, astonished by Ben's appearance in his home, can't convince Larry Tate that Ben is not is creation for an advertising campaign for Franklin Elec-tronics. Abner Kravitz refuses to believe Gladys' report that the real Ben Franklin is at the Stephens'. Bowing to Samantha's pleas, Darrin agrees to allow her and Aunt Clara to show Ben how his inventions are being used is the city. The next morning Ben, leaving a note that he has decided to tour the city alone to avoid causing domestic discord, sets out. Darrin, Samantha and Aunt Clara start searching for him. At a firehouse, inspecting an old fire engine, Ben steps on the accelerator. The engine shoots out into the street and slams into a curb. Ben is arrested and taken to court, where the judge, sure it is all a publicity stunt, charges him with grand larceny and sets bail at a thousand dollars. Darrin puts up the bail, knowing he will lose it if Ben doesn't appear for trial is a month. Just then, Aunt Clara remembers the spell and Ben vanishes.

programme.title: Samantha For The Defense
programme.desc: Summing up "My Friend Ben" Samantha tells how Aunt Clara, trying to summon an electrician to fix a lamp, produces Ben Franklin instead.

programme.title: A Gazebo Never Forgets
programme.desc: Samantha tells Aunt Clara she plans to get a bank loan in order to tear down the gazebo and build a rumpus room.

programme.title: Island Angels
programme.desc: In Hawaii, the Angels and Bosley get word that a professional assassin has been hired to kill Eric Nilsson of an international peace-keeping organization. Nilsson is scheduled to speak at the Convention Center in 48 hours. They are watching all incoming flights since Julie had seen the suspected assassin several years earlier in Istanbul and might recognize him. A swinging singles Club Paradise tour arrives with one suspicious looking member, Fredrick Ober. They apprehend Ober but soon realize that he is just a cover for the real assassin. Bosley and Julie pose as writer and photographer from "Single Life Magazine" and join the Club Paradise group. They have several false leads but soon uncover the real assassin, Lisa Gallo, posing as a member of the tour group. She is captured just in time to save Nilsson.

programme.title: Waikiki Angels
programme.desc: The Angels are in Honolulu (hoping for two weeks of sun, surf and no assignments) when they receive a call from Charlie advising that Congressman Knight's son, David, honeymooning with his wife, Marti, has been attacked while moonlight picnicking on the beach. David is critically injured and Marti is missing. The Angels pass all the tests -- sign on as lifeguards. Marti has been kidnapped and terrorized by three toughs who hold her in a secluded beach house. The three men later ram the legs of Kris' lifeguard stand with their vehicle but Kelly and Julie arrive in time to save her as the toughs escape. Bosley finds that there have been other complaints of beach assaults and the Angels recognize, from the pictures, the three who tried to attack Kris. Ted, one of the men, unbeknownst to the other two, takes Marti out of the beach house and drives to a phone where he calls Bosley with a ransom offer. Meanwhile, Marti gets away and into a shopping center where she is spotted wandering in a daze and is rescued by the Angels. The other two men discover what Ted has done and kill him. Later, Kris and Kelly are picked up and taken by the two toughs to the beach house. Kelly gets to her radio (while the two have Kris in another room) and reaches Bosley and Julie who come to the rescue and apprehend the kidnappers. David and Marti are well on their way to full recovery.

programme.title: Hula Angels
programme.desc: Steve Moss, owner of the Tropicana nightclub in Honolulu, is kidnapped, after firing young dancer, Donna Lindsey. He is taken in a van to a warehouse, where he is put into a cage with 60's rock music blaring in his ears. One of the specialties of his club is dancers in cages performing to 60's rock music. Steve is known as a hard taskmaster and is disliked by his dancers, particularly head dance show director, Stacy Parrish. A ransom note appears asking for $1 million with a note saying there will be one dancer missing each day until it is paid. Much to the surprise of everyone, Marian Moss, Steve's wife, advises that she doesn't have the $1 million asked. Since the Tropicana has been a lucrative nightclub, the Angels and Bosley (in various disguises) investigate and find through Donna Lindsey that Moss was really helping the young girls who couldn't make it in show business, and that is where the money went. They also discover that Stacy was a girlfriend of Moss before he met Marian and Stacy has staged the whole thing. They locate the warehouse where Moss is being kept and where Julie has also been taken. The two are freed and Stacy is taken into custody.

programme.title: Moonshinin' Angels
programme.desc: The Angels are sent to Moonshine country in the Deep South to investigate problems between long-feuding bootlegging families, the Bartletts and the Catlins. Son, Bobby Dan Bartlett, who is injured trying to get a shipment of whiskey to market and Catlin daughter, Melinda, are in love, much to the displeasure of both families. Kris gets a job with the Catlins as a still master. Kelly gets a job with the Bartletts as a driver. Julie takes a job as a waitress at Joe's Diner. Bosley poses as a wealthy southerner trying to buy both families out. The Angels find that the shootings and hijackings have not been done by the families, but by a group headed by Max Lacy from New York. Lacy is trying to corner the whiskey market and gain political control of the state. The Angels are able to stop a gunfight between the family elders, Hawkshaw Bartlett and Bluford Catlin, and show them who the real culprits are. Max Lacy and his group are arrested. Hobby Dan and Melinda are happily reunited.

programme.title: Angel in Hiding, Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 - Kelly and Kris pose as models and secure jobs with the Woodman Agency after the disappearance and subsequent death of model Jody Mills. They are joined by Julie Rogers, who, they later find out, is an undercover police officer working with partner Harry.

programme.title: Angel in Hiding, Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 - Kelly and Kris pose as models and secure jobs with the Woodman Agency after the disappearance and subsequent death of model Jody Mills. They are joined by Julie Rogers, who, they later find out, is an undercover police officer working with partner Harry.

programme.title: To See An Angel Die
programme.desc: After the Angels check into their hotel in Hawaii, Kris is kidnapped by a man who holds her responsible for his wife's suicide.

programme.title: Angels Of The Deep
programme.desc: Kris joins mysterious Bianca Blake in diving to look for wrecked ships. They find "The Starshine," a ship that sunk with a load of marijuana aboard -- but fail to notice that they are being observed by Claude and Walrus. In turn, Claude and Walrus are being watched by Blackie and Chin, two henchmen working for Tony K., the man who owned the lost marijuana. Claude and Walrus have removed the marijuana to a warehouse and are preparing to sell it to Tony K.'s original buyer -- Cindy Lee. The Angels go back to investigate the wreck because Kris' friend Bianca thinks the marijuana is still aboard. Claude finds them and blows up the ship. Julie struggles with him until they barely make it to safety. Bosley and the Angels capture Claude and Walrus as they are making a deal with Cindy Lee. The Angels vouch for Bianca, who was originally Claude's partner. Bianca goes free on the condition that she stay out of trouble.

programme.title: Island Angels
programme.desc: In Hawaii, the Angels and Bosley get word that a professional assassin has been hired to kill Eric Nilsson of an international peace-keeping organization. Nilsson is scheduled to speak at the Convention Center in 48 hours. They are watching all incoming flights since Julie had seen the suspected assassin several years earlier in Istanbul and might recognize him. A swinging singles Club Paradise tour arrives with one suspicious looking member, Fredrick Ober. They apprehend Ober but soon realize that he is just a cover for the real assassin. Bosley and Julie pose as writer and photographer from "Single Life Magazine" and join the Club Paradise group. They have several false leads but soon uncover the real assassin, Lisa Gallo, posing as a member of the tour group. She is captured just in time to save Nilsson.

programme.title: The Hungarian Curse
programme.desc: It's hard to know who has a curse over Oliver, but he sure has his hands full with Lisa and her fellow Hungarian Lazlo Broslav. Lazlo appears with a letter claiming he once saved the life of Lisa's uncle, and now her family must repay the debt.

programme.title: The Rutabaga Story
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.

programme.title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born (Part 1)
programme.desc: Green Acres goes Hollywood in this first installment of a two-part season finale. When Arnold the pig appears in a play at the Hooterville Theater, Lisa (Eva Gabor) arranges for an old friend to give Arnold a chance on the big screen.

programme.title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born (Part 2)
programme.desc: It's a swine-sational third season finale for Green Acres, as Oliver and Lisa chaperone Arnold, the Ziffel's talented pig, to Hollywood for his big screen test. There's only one problem, Lisa failed to mention that Arnold is not your normal actor.

programme.title: Guess Who's Not Going To The Luau
programme.desc: Hooterville is abuzz as the townsfolk enter a contest sponsored by Peterson's Poi Juice, with a trip to Hawaii as the top prize. But no one expects the winner to be Arnold, the Ziffels' talented pig. Maybe a pig might fly after all, to the islands!

programme.title: The Rummage Sale
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Eb's Romance
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Eb is quickly engaged to Loreli Appleby, whom he has only known for a day. Eb tries to impress Loreli's father, a farmer, but in typical fashion, he accidentally ruins his future father-in-law's cabbage crop.

programme.title: Hail To The Fire Chief
programme.desc: When Fire Chief Joe Carson is looking for a way to go to Miami, he hires Oliver as his assistant, hoping Oliver will pay for the trip. The plan backfires, no pun intended, when Oliver starts pointing out what a poor job the chief has been doing.

programme.title: The Candidate
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Handy Lessons
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: A Husband For Eleanor
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Old Mail Day
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to "Old Mail Day", when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: The Agricultural Student
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: How Hooterville Was Floundered
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: The Blue Feather
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Everywhere A Chick Chick
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: A Prize In Each And Every Package
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets A Beatnik
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Breaking Gender Norms
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy take on their most exciting challenge yet with Alan, a recently transitioned trans man seeking a bold, androgynous style. After years of prioritizing comfort over self-expression, Alan is ready to embrace a look that defies traditional norms. Together, they craft a style that brings Alan a true joy that is uniquely his own, breaking the rules of fashion along the way.

programme.title: Country Glitz and Glam
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy meet Naomi, former Amish and ex-stripper, who is seeking help after reverting to traditional Amish dress to hide her post-pregnancy body. Now back on the farm and raising a toddler, she yearns for the confidence she felt during her stripper days. Clinton and Stacy help Naomi find a style that both reclaims her femininity and balances her life as a new mom with a country heart.

programme.title: Masculine Avant-Garde
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy meet Maurice, a larger-than-life baker and devoted single dad ready to elevate his style to prepare for the opening of his new storefront. Needing a look to represent his brand, Maurice turns to Clinton and Stacy for help in creating a “masculine avant-garde” look that embodies his vibrant personality and commands respect as a successful business owner.

programme.title: 90s Preppy
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy welcome Selena, a goth content creator seeking a dramatic style transformation. Having worn an all-black aesthetic since middle school, Selena realizes that it hinders her ability to connect with others and looks for guidance to uncover a more approachable style that reflects her evolving identity.

programme.title: Why Fear & Horror Feels Kinda Good
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to fear? This fascination often balances us the edge of life and death, infused with a dash of excitement. From his beginnings as a Navy SEAL to becoming a renowned YouTuber, Mr. Ballen possesses a unique storytelling talent. He captivates us with some of the most spine-chilling true stories, drawn both from his experiences and the lives of others. Expect to learn why so many people are obsessed with True Crime and scary stories, the 3 terrifying but true stories MrBallen has prepared in this episode today, what being a NAVY Seal taught MrBallen about life & the backlash he has gotten from the NAVY Seal community by sharing his story, what it means to live a good life, if there is life after death, how to reinvent your entire life, what it takes to tell a good story and much more...

programme.title: Why Is Everyone So Emotionally Fragile?
programme.desc: Emotional maturity is a difficult thing to truly come by. Making your needs known, setting boundaries, being able to disappoint people without being afraid. If it's such an important skill, why is it so hard to discover how to develop it? Expect to learn how Whitney has been changed since becoming a mother, why Whitney has been thinking about circumcision so much, what codependence is and how to overcome it, why your niceness might be narcissism in disguise, why the news and memes are moving at such an insane velocity right now and much more...

programme.title: The Biology Of Focus, Success & Long-Term Energy
programme.desc: From personal dramas to scientific uproars, it's been a wild year for the biggest health & fitness podcaster in the world. And today we get to discover his biggest new insights about life, relationships and protocols. Expect to learn whether you actually should drink coffee within 90 minutes of waking up, how to get the best sleep of your life according to the latest science, how to become a morning person, what Andrew has learned about the perils of fame and public scrutiny, what new research says on the world of longevity supplements, why you should always do your research when testing with peptides and much more…
